title: Write your name
checkLabels.t1: Did you change the text to something of your own
checkLabels.t2: Is there anything in the editor
why.empty: The editor is empty. You deleted "Hello" but wrote nothing in its place. The task is to write your name — not just to remove someone else's.
why.unchanged: It still says "Hello". Delete it and write your name — that is the whole lesson. There is no right answer. There is yours.
hint2.unchanged: Click in the editor on the right. Select the word Hello. Press Backspace. Type your name.
blocks.0.text: No introduction. No explanations. On the right there is a page that says "Hello".
blocks.2.text: Delete "Hello" and write your name. Then press the green "Submit" button.
blocks.3.text: That is it. There is nothing else to do in this lesson.
blocks.5.text: You have just written a web page. I am not joking — what is on the right is a real page, the kind that would sit on the internet. It just happens to have only a name on it for now.
blocks.6.text: I am not going to explain what HTML is. I will explain it after you have written a few things — then the words will mean something.
